Loh, Esq. of Willenken Wilson Loh & Lieb LLP (213) 955-8030, appearing for Defendants and moving party; Gary E. Rescher, Esq. of Krieg Keller Sloan Reilley & Roman LLP, (415) 249-8330, appearing for Defendant Dennis Publishing Inc. (Non party to motion.); Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for relief from ruling is denied. There is no basis for relief under CCP section 473(b). Legal problem posed not complex and debatable, no excusable neglect shown. (See State Farm Fire & Casualty Co. vs. Pietak (2001) 90 Cal.App. 4th 600.) This is an improper motion for reconsideration. (See Wiz Technology, Inc. vs. Coopers & Lybrand (2003) 106 Cal.App. 4th 1, 17.) Request for sanctions is denied without prejudice. Notice of ruling is waived. Order signed in open Court.
